title: triticum vulgare var. aestivum
intro: Triticum vulgare var. aestivum, also known as common wheat or summer wheat, is a domesticated plant species in the genus Triticum, belonging to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Triticum vulgare var. aestivum include its potential to aid in digestion, relieve nausea, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits associated with consuming this plant include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving blood sugar control, and supporting weight management. Herbal preparations of Triticum vulgare var. aestivum include whole grain flour, wheat germ oil, and wheatgrass juice, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and supplements.
